Assignment

Bahar Evin

2026-01-07

Dataset Website: https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/antibacterial-consumption--total-consumption-of-antibacterials-expressed-as-ddd-per-1000-inhabitants-per-day

1 - Data Manipulating

(cleaning, fixing, rename)

# install.packages
library(tidyverse)
## Warning: package 'readr' was built under R version 4.5.2
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.6
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
## ✔ ggplot2   4.0.0     ✔ tibble    3.3.0
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ✔ purrr     1.2.0     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

# reading, saving, reading, check
data_antibiotic <- read_csv("data_antibiotic.csv")
## Rows: 416 Columns: 34
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr  (11): IndicatorCode, Indicator, ValueType, ParentLocationCode, ParentLo...
## dbl   (3): Period, FactValueNumeric, Value
## lgl  (19): IsLatestYear, Dim1 type, Dim1, Dim1ValueCode, Dim2 type, Dim2, Di...
## dttm  (1): DateModified
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
saveRDS(data_antibiotic, "data_antibiotic.rds")
data_antibiotic <- readRDS("data_antibiotic.rds")
head(data_antibiotic)
## # A tibble: 6 × 34
##   IndicatorCode Indicator            ValueType ParentLocationCode ParentLocation
##   <chr>         <chr>                <chr>     <chr>              <chr>         
## 1 GLASSAMC_TC   Total use of antiba… numeric   AFR                Africa        
## 2 GLASSAMC_TC   Total use of antiba… numeric   EUR                Europe        
## 3 GLASSAMC_TC   Total use of antiba… numeric   AFR                Africa        
## 4 GLASSAMC_TC   Total use of antiba… numeric   EUR                Europe        
## 5 GLASSAMC_TC   Total use of antiba… numeric   AFR                Africa        
## 6 GLASSAMC_TC   Total use of antiba… numeric   EMR                Eastern Medit…
## # ℹ 29 more variables: `Location type` <chr>, SpatialDimValueCode <chr>,
## #   Location <chr>, `Period type` <chr>, Period <dbl>, IsLatestYear <lgl>,
## #   `Dim1 type` <lgl>, Dim1 <lgl>, Dim1ValueCode <lgl>, `Dim2 type` <lgl>,
## #   Dim2 <lgl>, Dim2ValueCode <lgl>, `Dim3 type` <lgl>, Dim3 <lgl>,
## #   Dim3ValueCode <lgl>, DataSourceDimValueCode <lgl>, DataSource <lgl>,
## #   FactValueNumericPrefix <lgl>, FactValueNumeric <dbl>, FactValueUoM <lgl>,
## #   FactValueNumericLowPrefix <lgl>, FactValueNumericLow <lgl>, …
anyNA(data_antibiotic)
## [1] TRUE
colSums(is.na(data_antibiotic))
##              IndicatorCode                  Indicator 
##                          0                          0 
##                  ValueType         ParentLocationCode 
##                          0                          0 
##             ParentLocation              Location type 
##                          0                          0 
##        SpatialDimValueCode                   Location 
##                          0                          0 
##                Period type                     Period 
##                          0                          0 
##               IsLatestYear                  Dim1 type 
##                          0                        416 
##                       Dim1              Dim1ValueCode 
##                        416                        416 
##                  Dim2 type                       Dim2 
##                        416                        416 
##              Dim2ValueCode                  Dim3 type 
##                        416                        416 
##                       Dim3              Dim3ValueCode 
##                        416                        416 
##     DataSourceDimValueCode                 DataSource 
##                        416                        416 
##     FactValueNumericPrefix           FactValueNumeric 
##                        416                          0 
##               FactValueUoM  FactValueNumericLowPrefix 
##                        416                        416 
##        FactValueNumericLow FactValueNumericHighPrefix 
##                        416                        416 
##       FactValueNumericHigh                      Value 
##                        416                          0 
##     FactValueTranslationID               FactComments 
##                        416                        315 
##                   Language               DateModified 
##                          0                          0
# Deleting columns (missing values, unwanted columns)
data_antibiotic_clean <- data_antibiotic %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))
data_antibiotic_clean <- data_antibiotic_clean %>%
  select(-IndicatorCode, -ParentLocationCode, -SpatialDimValueCode, -FactComments)
names(data_antibiotic_clean)
##  [1] "Indicator"        "ValueType"        "ParentLocation"   "Location type"   
##  [5] "Location"         "Period type"      "Period"           "IsLatestYear"    
##  [9] "FactValueNumeric" "Value"            "Language"         "DateModified"
# Column rename, Fixing data type, Fixing rows
data_antibiotic_clean <- data_antibiotic_clean %>%
  rename(
    IsValueTypeNumeric = ValueType,
    IsIndicator        = Indicator
  )

data_antibiotic_clean <- data_antibiotic_clean %>%
  mutate(
    IsIndicator =
      IsIndicator ==
      "Total use of antibacterials expressed as DDD per 1000 inhabitants per day"
  )

data_antibiotic_clean$DateModified <- as.Date(data_antibiotic_clean$DateModified)

data_antibiotic_clean <- data_antibiotic_clean %>%
  mutate(
    IsValueTypeNumeric = 
      if_else(IsValueTypeNumeric == "numeric", TRUE, FALSE)
  )

data_antibiotic_clean %>%
  filter(grepl("Global", ParentLocation)) %>%
  select(ParentLocation, Location)
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
##   ParentLocation Location                                      
##   <chr>          <chr>                                         
## 1 Global         China, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region
## 2 Global         China, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region
## 3 Global         China, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region
data_antibiotic_clean <- data_antibiotic_clean %>%
  mutate(
    ParentLocation = if_else(
      grepl("Global", ParentLocation) &
        Location == "China, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region",
      "South-East Asia",
      ParentLocation
    )
  )

# Check and saving 
head(data_antibiotic_clean)
## # A tibble: 6 × 12
##   IsIndicator IsValueTypeNumeric ParentLocation        `Location type` Location 
##   <lgl>       <lgl>              <chr>                 <chr>           <chr>    
## 1 TRUE        TRUE               Africa                Country         Cote d'I…
## 2 TRUE        TRUE               Europe                Country         Ukraine  
## 3 TRUE        TRUE               Africa                Country         Ethiopia 
## 4 TRUE        TRUE               Europe                Country         Switzerl…
## 5 TRUE        TRUE               Africa                Country         Gabon    
## 6 TRUE        TRUE               Eastern Mediterranean Country         Qatar    
## # ℹ 7 more variables: `Period type` <chr>, Period <dbl>, IsLatestYear <lgl>,
## #   FactValueNumeric <dbl>, Value <dbl>, Language <chr>, DateModified <date>
sum(grepl("Global", data_antibiotic_clean$ParentLocation), na.rm = TRUE)
## [1] 0
saveRDS(data_antibiotic_clean, "data_antibiotic_clean.rds")

2 - Data Analysis

(Descriptive results, Statistical analysis)

data_antibiotic_clean <- readRDS("data_antibiotic_clean.rds")
data_antibiotic_analysis <- data_antibiotic_clean %>%
  select( ParentLocation, Location, Period, FactValueNumeric )

names(data_antibiotic_analysis)
## [1] "ParentLocation"   "Location"         "Period"           "FactValueNumeric"
saveRDS(data_antibiotic_analysis, "data_antibiotic_analysis.rds")

# a. Annual global antibiotic consumption between 2016 and 2023
annual_global_consumption <- data_antibiotic_analysis %>%
  filter(
    Period >= 2016,
    Period <= 2023
  ) %>%
  group_by(Period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_consumption = mean(FactValueNumeric, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
annual_global_consumption
## # A tibble: 8 × 2
##   Period mean_consumption
##    <dbl>            <dbl>
## 1   2016             19.2
## 2   2017             22.6
## 3   2018             21.5
## 4   2019             19.6
## 5   2020             18.4
## 6   2021             19.1
## 7   2022             19.8
## 8   2023             20.3
annual_consumption_summarise <- annual_global_consumption %>%
  summarise(
    min_year = Period[which.min(mean_consumption)],
    min_value = min(mean_consumption),
    max_year = Period[which.max(mean_consumption)],
    max_value = max(mean_consumption)
  )
annual_consumption_summarise
## # A tibble: 1 × 4
##   min_year min_value max_year max_value
##      <dbl>     <dbl>    <dbl>     <dbl>
## 1     2020      18.4     2017      22.6
# b. Average antibiotic consumption across regions over the years 2016-2023 (8-year period)
regional_avgerage <- data_antibiotic_analysis %>%
  filter(
    Period >= 2016,
    Period <= 2023
  ) %>%
  group_by(ParentLocation) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_antibiotic_use_2016_2023 = mean(FactValueNumeric, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
regional_avgerage
## # A tibble: 6 × 2
##   ParentLocation        avg_antibiotic_use_2016_2023
##   <chr>                                        <dbl>
## 1 Africa                                        21.7
## 2 Americas                                      13.3
## 3 Eastern Mediterranean                         28.9
## 4 Europe                                        17.9
## 5 South-East Asia                               26.5
## 6 Western Pacific                               20.0
# Linear regression test
linear_reg <- lm(mean_consumption ~ Period, data = annual_global_consumption)
summary(linear_reg)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = mean_consumption ~ Period, data = annual_global_consumption)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -1.5672 -0.9092 -0.1852  0.9469  2.0876 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept) 368.3141   438.5988   0.840    0.433
## Period       -0.1724     0.2172  -0.794    0.457
## 
## Residual standard error: 1.407 on 6 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.09508,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.05573 
## F-statistic: 0.6305 on 1 and 6 DF,  p-value: 0.4574
# correlation test
correlation_test <- cor.test(annual_global_consumption$Period,
         annual_global_consumption$mean_consumption,
         method = "spearman")
print(correlation_test)
## 
##  Spearman's rank correlation rho
## 
## data:  annual_global_consumption$Period and annual_global_consumption$mean_consumption
## S = 96, p-value = 0.752
## alternative hypothesis: true rho is not equal to 0
## sample estimates:
##        rho 
## -0.1428571
# Statistical test
max_region <- regional_avgerage[which.max(regional_avgerage$avg_antibiotic_use_2016_2023), ]
min_region <- regional_avgerage[which.min(regional_avgerage$avg_antibiotic_use_2016_2023), ]

cat("The region with the highest consumption:", max_region$ParentLocation, " (MEAN:", max_region$avg_antibiotic_use_2016_2023, ")\n")
## The region with the highest consumption: Eastern Mediterranean  (MEAN: 28.94028 )
cat("The region with the lowest consumption:", min_region$ParentLocation, " (MEAN:", min_region$avg_antibiotic_use_2016_2023, ")\n")
## The region with the lowest consumption: Americas  (MEAN: 13.30471 )
# Analysis of the Country with the Highest Consumption
max_country_name <- data_antibiotic_analysis %>%
  filter(Period >= 2016 & Period <= 2023) %>%
  group_by(Location) %>%
  summarise(max_country_avg = mean(FactValueNumeric, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_country_avg)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  pull(Location)

max_country_analysis <- data_antibiotic_analysis %>%
  filter(Period >= 2016, Period <= 2023) %>%
  group_by(Location, ParentLocation) %>%
  summarise(
    eight_year_avg = mean(FactValueNumeric, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )
max_country <- max_country_analysis %>%
  slice_max(eight_year_avg, n = 1)

print(paste("The country with the highest consumption:", max_country_name))
## [1] "The country with the highest consumption: Iran (Islamic Republic of)"
print(max_country)
## # A tibble: 1 × 3
##   Location                   ParentLocation        eight_year_avg
##   <chr>                      <chr>                          <dbl>
## 1 Iran (Islamic Republic of) Eastern Mediterranean           61.3

3) Visualizations

# Increase/decrease in global average antibiotic consumption over the years (2016 and 2023) : SCATTER PLOT 
ggplot(annual_global_consumption, aes(Period, mean_consumption)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color = "red"),
             alpha = 0.7,
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.05)) +  
geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Global Average Antibiotic Consumption (2016–2023)", 
       x = "Period - Year", y = "Mean Antibiotic Consumption (Global)", 
       caption = "Global average antibiotic consumption by year between 2016 and 2023, with a linear trend line showing temporal changes.") +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# Differences in antibiotic consumption by region between 2016 and 2023 : BOX PLOT
ggplot(
  data_antibiotic_analysis %>% 
    filter(Period >= 2016 & Period <= 2023),
  aes(x = ParentLocation, y = FactValueNumeric)) +
  
  geom_boxplot(outlier.color = "red", alpha = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Antibiotic Consumption Across Regions (2016–2023)",
    x = "Region",
    y = "Antibiotic Consumption",
    caption = "Regional distribution of antibiotic consumption across countries during the 2016–2023 period.") +
  theme_bw()

# Differences in antibiotic consumption by country between 2016 and 2023 (for first 10 country) : HORIZONTAL BAR CHART
# (mean calculation for each country and determine top 10)
country_avg <- data_antibiotic_analysis %>%
  filter(Period >= 2016 & Period <= 2023) %>%
  group_by(Location) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_antibiotic_consumption = mean(FactValueNumeric, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
first_ten_country <- country_avg %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_antibiotic_consumption)) %>%
  slice(1:10) 

ggplot(first_ten_country,
       aes(x = reorder(Location, avg_antibiotic_consumption),
           y = avg_antibiotic_consumption,
           fill = Location == first_ten_country$Location)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey70", "red"), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Countries by Average Antibiotic Consumption (2016–2023)",
    x = "Country (Top 10)",
    y = "Average Antibiotic Consumption (2016–2023)",
    caption = "Top 10 countries with the highest average antibiotic consumption from 2016 to 2023."
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
## Warning: Use of `first_ten_country$Location` is discouraged.
## ℹ Use `Location` instead.

# Results Table
kable(
  summary(linear_reg)$coefficients,
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Linear regression model output summarizing the relationship between year and global average antibiotic consumption (2016–2023)."
)
Linear regression model output summarizing the relationship between year and global average antibiotic consumption (2016–2023).
Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
(Intercept) 368.314 438.599 0.840 0.433
Period -0.172 0.217 -0.794 0.457
